childElements.name: MessageTextBlock
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "TextBlock1", "text" : "

We’ve noticed that the following shifts from the matching Practice Operations Contract(s) are not included in this clone. Do you want to proceed? 

", "show" : null, "dataJSON" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "textKey" : "", "sanitize" : false }
